_comment: Return policy as DATA, not prose. Each rule: evaluable condition, single licensed outcome, citable source_text, the facts it needs (requires_facts -> unanswerable detection), and a priority (specificity). Higher priority dominates when multiple rules fire. The gate uses priority for check #2.5 (precedence) and deadlock detection.

rules.title: Standard 30-day return window
rules.source_text: Most items may be returned within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.

rules.title: Outside standard window
rules.source_text: Returns are not accepted more than 30 days after delivery.

rules.title: Electronics 15-day window (eligible)
rules.source_text: Electronics may be returned within 15 days of delivery.

rules.title: Electronics past 15-day window (ineligible)
rules.source_text: Electronics returns are not accepted after 15 days, shorter than the standard window.

rules.title: Defective item override
rules.source_text: Defective items may be returned for a refund or replacement regardless of the standard window.

rules.title: Final-sale items are non-returnable
rules.source_text: Final-sale items (clearance, gift cards, intimates) cannot be returned or exchanged.

rules.title: Goodwill grant (eligible)
rules.source_text: A supervisor may grant a goodwill return as an exception.

rules.title: Fraud hold (ineligible)
rules.source_text: Accounts under a fraud hold are not eligible for returns pending review.
